expectations.text: All 4 questions are answered autonomously — none asked back to user
expectations.evidence: All 4 questions answered fully. No questions asked back.

expectations.text: References existing Knowlune gamification features found in the codebase (streaks, achievements, progress tracking)
expectations.evidence: Detailed inventory of existing features with file paths: studyLog.ts, AchievementBanner.tsx, Challenges.tsx, openBadges.ts, xapiStatements.ts, useEngagementPrefsStore.ts, StudyGoalsWidget.tsx.

expectations.text: Recommendations are specific to personal learning platforms, not generic gamification advice
expectations.evidence: Clearly frames around personal (not social) platform. Recommends intrinsic motivation, rejects leaderboards and currency systems. Suggests progressive disclosure for onboarding.

expectations.text: Each answer includes reasoning and at least some mention of trade-offs
expectations.evidence: Answers include reasoning but trade-offs are not consistently structured. Q1 lists 'to consider' and 'to avoid' but not explicit trade-offs. Q4 has pros/cons. Q2 and Q3 lack explicit trade-off framing.
